title: Contract Store
objective: Deliver and validate the native Mission and Wave contract store.
exit_criteria: Schema valid; latest-wins retrieval verified; compatibility projection preserved.
outcome_summary: Native Mission and Wave contracts accepted with store and schema checks.

title: Team Console
objective: Build the Wave-centered Agent Team Console for execution, visibility, and control.
exit_criteria: Mission/Wave context renders; team execution is observable; operator actions and gate controls are verified.
plan_note: Retry keeps the accepted contract and narrows the UI to MemberRun activity, evidence, and explicit gate readiness.
gate_note: Two criteria are evidenced; QA approval remains blocked.

title: Provider Hooks
objective: Add provider-neutral hooks for transient activity and captured provider-native delegation.
exit_criteria: Hooks are observable without persisting raw thinking.
plan_note: Begin only after the Team Console gate decision.
